body:

We're still a bit short of our fundraising pace for this month, so let me give you three good reasons to add your contribution to our campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191207-three?refcode=em191207-three&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team --

We're still a bit short of our fundraising pace for this month, so I'm asking you to dig a little deeper to help us reach our weekly goal. Let me give you three good reasons:

1\. December is a tough month for fundraising because folks are traveling to visit family and tuning out to focus on celebrating the holidays (and rightly so!).

2\. As you can imagine, that leaves us in a bit of a pickle as we come up on our biggest FEC deadline of the year -- which is why my team and I decided to set a weekly goal of raising $20,000 before midnight on Sunday to get back on track.

3\. Small-dollar contributions of $5, $10, or whatever folks like you can afford to give can go a long way in helping us hit our target.

**So, I'm reaching out to ask you directly if you would consider donating today to meet our $20,000 goal before tomorrow's deadline. Scott Walker, not the 2019 fight to impeach President Donald Trump. But for some who lived through the former, the episodes have**clear similarities and a warning for Democrats about overreach and distraction.**_[_Read more..._](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nckykd-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Join Me: CLICK HERE to Fight Impeachment!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nckykd-ahkdjtlkr-j/) Take it from me, the liberals in Madison and Washington know plenty about overreach and distraction.As the Senate Majority Leader and a top leader in the Act 10 fight, I saw firsthand how the Democrats react when someone dares to oppose them: **They filed petitions in my Senate district and forced me into a recall election.** In the end, my district had the final say: they re-elected me by more than 17 points and nearly 15,000 votes.**With your help, we can do the same thing in 2020 - making our voices heard at the ballot box!****[Click here to join my campaign right away,](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nckykd-ahkdjtlkr-t/)** and let's show **Nancy Pelosi** what Wisconsin really thinks about what she's doing in Congress.Thanks,Scott FitzgeraldP.S., Join my campaign to fight back against Nancy Pelosi and the Washington liberals with a contribution of [$10, $25, 50, or even $100](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nckykd-ahkdjtlkr-i/)! body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/s1tRotIl5SSGLCCxsNIEdY5nBDjXXi0xnXuZ0dfM18M=/w2dkQ4AuevKlxzN0u0HRw5aHzxVZkU5WnblqN9FuCfw=?refcode=191208-email) _Welcome to another edition of the Rita Review! We hope you all had a wonderful Thanksgiving; now we 're ready to head into December with full bellies and determination to finish out this year and decade as strong as possible! Read all about the latest from the campaign trail below:_ **We hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving!** Rita, Paul and the Hart family gathered together to give thanks and spend some much-needed family time together. We're all so grateful for all of our supporters, too, and we hope all of you had an equally great holiday! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/s1tRotIl5SSGLCCxsNIEdY5nBDjXXi0xnXuZ0dfM18M=/w2dkQ4AuevKlxzN0u0HRw5aHzxVZkU5WnblqN9FuCfw=?refcode=191208-email) **Meeting with folks across the district:** On a recent trip to Lee County, Rita visited the Keokuk National Cemetery. Rita is so impressed with this southeast Iowa treasure and is excited to work to draw attention to this historic monument as a congresswoman! She also visited the Lost Canvas coffee shop where she listened to folks talk about the importance of bringing the voices of rural Iowa communities to Washington. That discussion included hearing about healthcare concerns, the high costs and the threat of hospital closures that are hurting rural Iowans. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/s1tRotIl5SSGLCCxsNIEdY5nBDjXXi0xnXuZ0dfM18M=/w2dkQ4AuevKlxzN0u0HRw5aHzxVZkU5WnblqN9FuCfw=?refcode=191208-email) Over the last month, Rita also had stops in Bettendorf, Fairfield, Iowa City, Muscatine, Newton, and Ottumwa. Just this past week, Rita joined Representative Wes Breckenridge at Jasper County's Bi-partisan Soup Supper. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/s1tRotIl5SSGLCCxsNIEdY5nBDjXXi0xnXuZ0dfM18M=/w2dkQ4AuevKlxzN0u0HRw5aHzxVZkU5WnblqN9FuCfw=?refcode=191208-email) **In honor of Veterans Day:** Rita attended the Clinton AmVets flag burning ceremony. She sang the national anthem and _God Bless America_ at this important community event to honor the service and sacrifice of our men and women in uniform. [Watch the video](https://act.myngp.com/el/s1tRotIl5SSGLCCxsNIEdY5nBDjXXi0xnXuZ0dfM18M=/nLpIchMhgzYEpqoqgM4N2cmxGeorcQGKIKhX87sGgFU=) **Proud of Rita 's work with Hometown Pride:** Rita's involvement with Keep Iowa Beautiful's Hometown Pride program got the attention of a reporter from the _DeWitt Observer_. Rita's gone to nearly every single meeting and knows that it's groups like this that lead to more community cohesion. In small communities, all the odds seem stacked against them, and Rita's proud to work with Hometown Pride to provide support and grow local economic development. [Read the article](https://act.myngp.com/el/s1tRotIl5SSGLCCxsNIEdY5nBDjXXi0xnXuZ0dfM18M=/R4zxc-i8F3rkZWEzf7VXU2mJDruxWYCtxc_6oU7vZ40=?fbclid=IwAR3WZAIY3n4rokLzAsSANhE0cF5cBLfnnmjy7BuEczX-ObfKjoqRcVhpKig) **October Endorsement Corner:** In case you missed it, Rita was endorsed by both Planned Parenthood Action Fund and NARAL last month! They know Rita will fight for women's healthcare, and we're proud to stand with these great organizations advocating for women and families across the country. That's it for this month's Rita Review! We hope you all have a great holiday season. Make sure to check in on social media so you can see how the Rita HQ is remembering the past year and getting ready for 2020! [FACEBOOK](https://act.myngp.com/el/s1tRotIl5SSGLCCxsNIEdY5nBDjXXi0xnXuZ0dfM18M=/ZNFS8kXMOGcefLsX8j-kAnjJG0xPBQFjiZjjoUuh-BQ=)
[TWITTER](https://act.myngp.com/el/s1tRotIl5SSGLCCxsNIEdY5nBDjXXi0xnXuZ0dfM18M=/P4PXehPq1k_Ccxt21bfFucy_UL1hh8PTnz907VhXTng=?lang=en) \-- Team Rita __ __ __ __ __ __ __ __ | __**_**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Help us send Rita to Washington by making a donation today! They're the best way to show your support.**_**__ | __**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/s1tRotIl5SSGLCCxsNIEdY5nBDjXXi0xnXuZ0dfM18M=/w2dkQ4AuevKlxzN0u0HRw5aHzxVZkU5WnblqN9FuCfw=?refcode=191208-email)**__

name: MJ Hegar
subject: I'm proud to be a Texan, but I'm not proud of this statistic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Texas has the highest uninsured rate in the nation

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890935/7f51f7bc/4a490b4a/4ef0f6b1/2812132363/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | **It's time to build a health care system
that works for ALL Americans.** **[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890935/7f51f7bc/4a490b4a/4ef0f6b0/2812132363/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-healthcarepetition")** Peter,

Health care is an incredibly personal issue for me. I had two difficult pregnancies, so I understand the stress that can be caused by a medical emergency. And I know I'm not alone -- the number one issue I hear about on the campaign trail is the rising cost of health care.

Our current system is one of sky-high costs and inefficiencies, and **we in Texas have the highest uninsured rate in the nation.** That needs to change.

**[Sign your name with mine if you agree it's time to build a health care system that works for ALL Americans>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890935/7f51f7bc/4a490b4a/4ef0f6b0/2812132363/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-healthcarepetition")**

Senator Cornyn thinks the answer to our problems is to undo the progress we've made. He voted 18 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act (which would strip _millions more_ people of their health care), and he hand-picked the judges currently weighing the lawsuit that would dismantle it -- including the protections for people with pre-existing conditions.

**We can't go back to when insurance companies could discriminate against folks with pre-existing conditions or sell junk plans that leave people saddled with debt. What we need to do is create a public option for anyone who wants it, so that every American can live healthier, longer lives.

[Insurance companies are making record profits, and your premiums are paying executives' huge salaries and bonuses. Add your name if you agree it's time to call their bluff and force them to compete with a Medicare buy-in option.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890935/7f51f7bc/4a490b4a/4ef0f6b0/2812132363/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-healthcarepetition")**

We also need to support organizations that are providing our communities with sorely needed women's health care services and increase access to sex education, affordable over-the-counter contraception, and cost-effective childcare.

**When I'm in the Senate, I'll fight for a health care agenda that will improve care and lower costs for hardworking Texans** \-- not increase profits for big insurance executives. But I need to know you're with me on this.

**[If you agree it's time to create a health care system where every American can get the care they need, add your name alongside mine today>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890935/7f51f7bc/4a490b4a/4ef0f6b0/2812132363/VEsD/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-healthcarepetition")**

See you on the trail,
MJ Hegar

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890935/7f51f7bc/4a490b4a/4ef0f6b7/2812132363/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-tx?refcode=email_20191208.2d__595__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

subject: We're closing out the hottest decade on record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, We have lived through the hottest decade on record, with the previous decades also being warmer than the last. This is just another step in the path we're going down toward irreversible climate change and destruction. Despite all of the evidence, Trump is pulling the U.S. out of the Paris Climate Agreement and increasing companies' abilities to pollute and destroy the environment. On top of that, Justice Brett Kavanaugh has signaled that he would be the Supreme Court's fifth and deciding vote to overturn generations of precedent and dismantle the EPA's ability to regulate corporate pollution. This couldn't come at a more dangerous time. The Supreme Court could gut the EPA's ability to set regulations as early as the next term, which means even if Democrats take back the White House in 2020, we'd also need to hold the House majority and flip the Senate in order to ensure the conservative Court wouldn't overturn the new president's attempts to fight climate change. A recent U.N. report on climate change revealed the devastating likelihood that our inaction has doubled how much the Earth's temperature will rise by the end of the century unless we take immediate action. We need engaged voters to act now: **Will you vote blue to fight climate change in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcbd/6e9863e8/171e9615/1db0bbbf/1045066525/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/CQTmDx0S") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcbd/6e9863e8/171e9615/1db0bbbf/1045066525/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/CQTmDx0S") Thank you for your commitment to the cause. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcbd/6e9863e8/171e9615/1db0bbbe/1045066525/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191208a.ND&refcode2=jKyTUef2Ko9YE6J9LRnr")

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Breaking news: It gets even worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
|
---
| | On Friday, I told you all about Trump appointee Seema Verma -- the one using her position overseeing Medicare and Medicaid to enrich Republican political consultants. Last night it got worse. New documents show that Verma tried to get taxpayers to reimburse her for $47,000 in jewelry that was stolen on a work trip. Yes, you read that right. $47,000 of our tax dollars. For her jewelry. Here's the thing about Verma: She should have been fired a long time ago because she has used her position to take health care AWAY from the Americans that need it most. This drip-drip of corruption, cronyism and abuse of power is icing on the cake. It's time for Verma to go. [Let's make sure the Trump Administration hears that loud and clear.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639096a/55b66746/2d51864b/80f1080/2180334959/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-08-verma&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") _Joe_ [Donate Now](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639096a/55b66746/2d51864b/80f1080/2180334959/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-08-verma&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Forwarded Message [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639096a/55b66746/2d51864b/80f1081/2180334959/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/") Donald Trump built his administration by putting people in charge of agencies and programs they'd spent their careers trying to dismantle. One of those people was **Seema Verma, a Republican consultant who'd worked with Mike Pence to make Medicaid less effective and more expensive for Indiana residents**. She'd also been at the center of a conflict-of-interest scandal, when folks learned that she was not only consulting on Indiana Medicaid policy, but also working for one of the state's largest Medicaid vendors. **The streamlined version: Verma's qualifications were (1) making it harder for people to get the care they need, and (2) fleecing Medicaid to line her pockets.** So Donald Trump (with the consent of the Senate) put her in charge of Medicaid and Medicare. **[America deserves so much better than Seema Verma, Donald Trump, and the Senate that enables their corruption. That's what our fight's about. Chip in $3 now to keep the movement strong!](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639096a/55b66746/2d51864b/80f1080/2180334959/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-08-verma&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** [Donate Now](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639096a/55b66746/2d51864b/80f1080/2180334959/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-08-verma&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Since taking office, Verma has sought to slash benefits and shift costs onto sick and low-income people. On her _first day_ , she wrote a letter encouraging states to begin charging Medicaid recipients monthly premiums and emergency room fees. **At the same time she was claiming the government couldn't afford to help poor people access crucial health care, her agency was spending _millions of taxpayer dollars _on public relations consultants to polish Verma's media profile**. And it gets worse: Those PR consultants? name: Jason Yates
subject: Countdown to Christmas
body:
Hi Peter,
We, at My Faith Votes, are preparing our hearts for Christmas by reading a chapter a day from the Gospel book of Luke this month. The book of Luke has twenty-four chapters so when we finish on Christmas Eve, we’ll have read about the life of Jesus and have a greater appreciation for the reason we celebrate His birth.
Every evening for about 10 - 15 minutes we are streaming live on the My Faith Votes' Facebook page at [https://facebook.com/myfaithvotes](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=-seqDhhx2BUd84N4jj3iUzEsoLrSbBKYqmLHiXrIAq4WQC21c7Iw3UgSI1O5aKBH&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191208com01&n=1) as we read a chapter from Luke, and if you are not able to watch us on Facebook, we have on-demand videos available on our website at [https://www.myfaithvotes.org/2019-countdown-to-christmas](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRmLLymUKqiZFVFbCVlmLFhO8QgRwMGVYbgb7v5hLOz_b0biXq5wsh9A7bG9h0_zbw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191208com01&n=2).
We realize in today's fast-paced world, time is one of the more precious things, but we hope you can set aside some time this month to go through the Christmas advent calendar with your family to be reminded of the real reason for the season and the hope we have in Christ that we can share with others.
Blessings,
Jason
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191208com01&n=3).

body:

| | |

|
# **LAST WEEK WITH ROB**

Hello once again. I hope you all had a wonderful Thanksgiving with family and friends and are staying warm with the weather we’ve experienced in recent days. This past week, I kicked off the Christmas season with the Medina Parade of Lights, we uncovered more Cuomo Corruption, and we finally heard what New York Democrats plan to do this upcoming session. I’ll give you one guess (hint: it’s to raise your taxes).

---
|
---
| **ORLEANS COUNTY: Medina Parade of Lights**
This annual parade brings together communities from around Medina to kick off the holiday season. Each entry is tasked with designing, preparing, and showing off their creative capabilities with a parade float, and this year, Team Ortt assembled a float that we dubbed “Christmas Americana.” Complete with shooting stars, a red, white, and blue Christmas tree, and classic Christmas icons, we proudly displayed our nation's colors. Hundreds of people gathered on Main Street to view all of the floats and some special guests, Mr. and Mrs. Santa Claus.

---
|
---
### **Cuomo Corruption**
Now, some new info surrounding the ongoing corruption scandal involving Gov. Cuomo, JCOPE, and the Inspector General. In case you missed it, the Joint Commission on Public Ethics (JCOPE) is accused of leaking private meeting information to the Governor and disclosing who voted “yes” on whether to investigate the Governor on corruption associated with his convicted former aid, Joseph Percoco. The commission, of course, voted no and subsequently when the leak was discovered, it was given to the Cuomo appointees in the Inspector General’s (IG) office.

It now appears that the IG’s office proceeded to whitewash the investigation, essentially claiming that no one would give them information corroborating the accusations, and to no surprise, could not find any substantiated evidence that indicated a leak or any wrongdoing by the Governor’s office. Just another day in Albany, folks.

With no action taken by any other state leaders or elected officials, it is imperative we get U.S. Attorney General William Barr involved in this matter.

|
---
### **Pay Commission**
Finally, late last week (Sunday evening when nobody was looking) Democrat appointees on a public campaign finance commission board approved $100 million in taxpayer funds to be used for political campaigns. With the creation of public campaign finance, New York City liberals placed the duty of creating the program into the hands of unelected, hand-picked leftist allies.

When later asked by a capitol reporter what the Democrats' plans were to account for the looming $6 billion budget deficit facing New York State, their answer was to 'raise revenue," which in non-politician talk translates to "raise taxes". How rich is that? One day, Democrats are handing out millions to political candidates and the next they are turning to the taxpayers to fund it. The Democrats are now showing their true colors and unfortunately, that means it's open season on your pocketbooks and mine.

What can I say, folks, this is what happens when you live under one-party rule. We must make sure this doesn't happen on a national scale in 2020.
| As always, feel free to stay up to date on my campaign by following me on facebook and twitter at @RobOrttforCongress and let me know what’s going on in your community and your life. Thank you and God Bless.

Rob
Battle-tested Patriot

body:
Making sure you saw Ed's note about the recent climate strikes. | |

| **Making sure you saw Ed 's note about the recent climate strikes. We need you to be part of this movement. Add your name to say you stand with climate activists and Ed in the fight to pass the Green New Deal and save our planet**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df25/693b8b0a/43b72cfb/72de7def/133103509/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/stand-with-climate-strikers?source=em191208-full")**
Friends -

Climate change is here, and we're in the fight for our lives.

In September, thousands of young activists walked out of their classrooms and took to the streets to demand climate action.

It was an inspiring, powerful, and necessary moment as we continue to face the greatest challenge to our planet.

That's why we're striking once again today. I joined activists across Massachusetts for today's climate strike.

[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df25/693b8b0a/43b72cfb/72de7def/133103509/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/stand-with-climate-strikers?source=em191208-full")
We rallied at Copley Square in Boston to take a stand and demand action on the Green New Deal.

**[I'm asking you to stand with us in solidarity. Will you add your name to say you're in this fight and demand that we act on climate before it is too late?](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df25/693b8b0a/43b72cfb/72de7def/133103509/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/stand-with-climate-strikers?source=em191208-full")**

This is not a moment. It's a movement.

[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df25/693b8b0a/43b72cfb/72de7def/133103509/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/stand-with-climate-strikers?source=em191208-full")
But we cannot wait any longer. Climate change is here and taking its toll. The planet has a fever, and there are no emergency rooms for planets.

**[Add your name right now to join us in demanding action on climate change. Together, we can pass the Green New Deal and save our planet.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df25/693b8b0a/43b72cfb/72de7def/133103509/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/stand-with-climate-strikers?source=em191208-full")**

I'm so grateful to the young people who are bringing the activism and energy we need on this issue.

It's going to take all of us to win this fight, so thank you for adding your voice with ours.

\- Ed **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df25/693b8b0a/43b72cfb/72de7def/133103509/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/stand-with-climate-strikers?source=em191208-full")**

name: Charles Booker
subject: This is a movement to take on gun violence.
body:
|
---
Folks, When I see stories about gun violence, I see my family. My cousin TJ died from gun violence on Easter Sunday a few years ago. Since then, I’ve had cousins murdered each year. And I’m not alone. 100 people in this country die from gun violence every day. The trauma never goes away for the families who grieve these deaths. _Here I am with my Uncle Tyrone, TJ’s dad, at the vigil in remembrance of TJ’s life._ Gun violence plagues our communities, and Mitch McConnell refuses to use his power to stop it. We know that expanded background checks have both overwhelming support and the power to save lives. Yet that very legislation sits on Mitch’s desk right now as he proudly calls himself the “Grim Reaper.” He sold our safety to the NRA for more than $1 million in donations. He will always choose gun lobby money over the lives of Kentuckians. [_**Mitch is beholden to the gun lobby. I’m accountable to you and you alone. name: Booker HQ
subject: We need a president who will fight for HBCUs.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
Cory has the boldest plan ever to invest in our HBCUs. Period.
| | |
---
| Team, It's Christina here. As a member of this campaign and a proud Howard University grad, I'd like to tell you a little bit about Cory's plan to support and invest in our Historically Black Colleges and Universities. First of all, Cory has the boldest plan ever to invest in our HBCUs. Period. As the son of two parents who went to HBCUs, this is personal for Cory. His mom is a graduate of Fisk University, and his father graduated from North Carolina Central University. These schools have contributed to the advancement of our country. But the news we hear too frequently about our HBCUs is that they're struggling in many ways due to lack of funding. Cory wants to change that. **Cory 's plan would commit $100 billion to upgrade facilities and infrastructure, boost graduation rates, and invest in research and STEM education.** **[Team, sign your name here if you believe that we should ensure America's HBCUs and Minority-Serving Institutions (MSIs) are well-funded, affordable, and continue to deliver opportunity for Black and Brown Americans.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/support-hbcus-and-msis?source=em_pet_20191208_BHQ_20191208-pet-BHQ-HBCU-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Cory's proposal goes beyond HBCUs to invest in other MSIs as well -- because we should also be talking about creating opportunities for other marginalized groups, including the Latinx and tribal communities, that are too often left out of the conversation. Howard was one of the few safe spaces in this country where I was able to learn and exist freely, especially as a young Black woman and, eventually, a first-generation college graduate. Howard provided me with a sense of community and family -- to this day, many of the students I met at Howard are still my best friends. And more importantly, Howard prepared me for what was ahead. In a nation where Black students are still not afforded equity and equality when it comes to public and higher education, HBCUs, even with financial challenges, continue to provide world-class education and produce most of the nation's Black doctors, lawyers, judges, engineers, and more. **[Add your name if you agree that we need to invest more in our HBCUs and MSIs. These institutions empower the communities they serve.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/support-hbcus-and-msis?source=em_pet_20191208_BHQ_20191208-pet-BHQ-HBCU-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I am truly grateful for the experience I had at Howard. Being a student can be tough. Sometimes, young people just need an extra push to get across the finish line. At my school, I was surrounded by professors and mentors that always encouraged me to keep going. And I'm sure many people who've attended other HBCUs or MSIs would tell you the same thing: **HBCUs and MSIs never give up on their students.** We shouldn't give up on them. Christina Coleman
Director of Millennial & Influencer Engagement
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/support-hbcus-and-msis?source=em_pet_20191208_BHQ_20191208-pet-BHQ-HBCU-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c51/5fca0d19/7813cd47/291c8975/499964866/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c51/5fca0d19/7813cd47/291c8974/499964866/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c51/5fca0d19/7813cd47/291c8973/499964866/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c51/5fca0d19/7813cd47/291c8972/499964866/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c51/5fca0d19/7813cd47/291c8976/499964866/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

Hello

I've heard it time and again from farmers as I travel the district and I've said it a hundred times out on the trail: farmers want trade, not aid. Farmers want open markets to sell their products so that they can continue to not only feed Iowa, but feed the world. Free trade is responsible for so many of the things that Iowan's value: the quality of jobs, the success of businesses of all sizes, and a thriving economy. That is why it is vital that Congress do its job and get the United States Mexico Canada Agreement (USMCA) passed.

If elected to Congress, I promise to stand up for Iowa producers, manufacturers, small businesses and farmers by supporting USMCA every step of the way. The USMCA will provide extended access to the Mexican and Canadian markets, while also creating plenty of new export opportunities for Iowa products. It will also prevent government overreach in the form of trade barriers disguised as food and animal safety measures.

In Congress, I will also be committed to:
* Expanding trade opportunities for our farmers and agricultural producers
* Increasing Iowa's global competitiveness
* Utilizing exports to promote economic growth
* Combating trade barriers that reduce our competitiveness in foreign markets
* Continuing to improve transparency in the open market

Democrats have completely stalled on USMCA because they refuse to give President Trump a "win". Just like the other Democrats in Iowa's Congressional delegation, JD Scholten would drag his feet to pass a good deal for Iowa farmers.

But I can't fight for the USMCA and the preservation of fair trade without your help. Please consider donating $5, $15 or even $25 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a98b27cbb7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_03_08_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a98b27cbb7-25822489) to our campaign, as well as help spread my message throughout your community. Your generous donations can be made here. (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a98b27cbb7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_03_08_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a98b27cbb7-25822489)

You can also support our conservative voice that's desperately needed in Washington by attending our ONE-NIGHT-ONLY concert with country singer Trey Taylor happening THIS FRIDAY at 7 PM. Back in 2016, Trey opened rallies for President Trump and has been touring ever since. I'm grateful for the support and confidence that Trey has placed in our movement. Read on to find out more about his special performance!

Your neighbor,
